chains.title: Fixture upload and token boundary chain
trust_boundaries: HTTP header token -> renderer authorization context
attacker_controlled_steps: request token reaches renderer token parameter
broken_security_invariants: untrusted input must be validated before trusted rendering
request headers must not become trusted authorization state implicitly
chains.impact: Fixture-scoped chain demonstrating how two defensive findings compose without exploit payloads.
safe_validation_plan: static local trace over src/handler.py and src/report.py
benign mocked request regression test plan
recommended_remediation: add explicit validation boundary before render_report
validate token semantics before renderer use
